zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Elizabeth Montacute於1325年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特多亞特時，她的父親William Montagu24歲，母親Catherine Grandison9歲。她於1350年7月10日之前與Sir Guy Brienne結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1359年5月31日在英國英格蘭哈普爾艾殊利享年34歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾福可斯波利福可斯波利 艾比。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Elizabeth Montacute于1325年出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特多亞特时，她的父亲William Montagu24岁，母亲Catherine Grandison9岁。她于1350年7月10日之前与Sir Guy Brienne结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1359年5月31日在英国英格兰哈普爾艾殊利享年34岁，埋葬在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾福可斯波利福可斯波利 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: Montacute
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Montague
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from either Montaigu-le-bois (Manche) or Montaigu (Manche, Aisne), named with Old French mont ‘hill’ + agu ‘pointed’ (from Latin acutus). Drogo de Montagud was a companion of William the Conqueror and founder of the Montagu(e) family, among whom the personal name Drogo was revived in the 19th century. Another family of the name Monatgu have held the titles of Duke of Montagu, Earl of Sandwich, Earl and Duke of Manchester, Earl of Halifax, and Earl of Beaulieu, and.
Irish: adopted as equivalent of Gaelic Mac Taidhg (see McTigue ).

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Elizabeth Montacute was born in 1325, in Donyatt, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, her father, William Montagu, was 24 and her mother, Catherine Grandison, was 9. She married Sir Guy Brienne before 10 July 1350. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 31 May 1359, in Ashley, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 34, and was buried in Tewkesbury Abbey, Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Elizabeth Montacute est née en 1325, à Donyatt, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Montagu, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Catherine Grandison, avait 9 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Guy Brienne avant 10 juillet 1350. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 31 mai 1359, à Ashley, Hampshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 34 ans, et a été enterrée à Tewkesbury Abbey, Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Elizabeth Montacute 1325 in Donyatt, Somerset, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Montagu 24 und ihre Mutter Catherine Grandison 9. Sie hat vor 10. Juli 1350 Sir Guy Brienne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 31. Mai 1359 im Alter von 34 Jahren in Ashley, Hampshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Tewkesbury Abbey, Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elizabeth Montacute è nata il nel 1325 nel Donyatt, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, William Montagu, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Catherine Grandison, aveva 9 anni. Lei sposato Sir Guy Brienne prima del 10 luglio 1350. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 31 maggio 1359, nel Ashley, Hampshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 34 anni, e fu sepolta a Tewkesbury Abbey, Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Montacuteが1325年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトドニーアットで生まれた時，父William Montaguは24歳，母Catherine Grandisonは9歳であった。1350年7月10日以前にSir Guy Brienneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1359年5月31日にイギリスイギリスハンプシュアイアアシュリーで34歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアテウケスブリーテウケスブリー アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.Tewkesbury Abbey, Tewkesbury, Gloucester: 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 튜케스버이 튜케스버이 애브브이
ko.lifeSummary: Lady Elizabeth Montacute(이)가 1325년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 도니엇에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Montagu(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Catherine Grandison(은)는 9세였다. 그녀는 1350년 7월 10일 이전 Sir Guy Brienne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1359년 5월 31일 영국 잉글랜드 함프실르 애슐리에서 34세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 튜케스버이 튜케스버이 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Elizabeth Montacute nasceu em 1325, em Donyatt, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, William Montagu, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Grandison, tinha 9 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Guy Brienne antes 10 de julho de 1350. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 31 de maio de 1359, em Ashley, Hampshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 34 anos, e foi sepultada em Tewkesbury Abbey, Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Tewkesbury Abbey, Tewkesbury, Gloucester: тюкесбури эбби, тюкесбури, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Elizabeth Montacute родилась в 1325 г. в местности донятт, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Montagu было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Catherine Grandison, 9. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Guy Brienne перед 10 июля 1350 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 31 мая 1359 г. в местности ашли, хампшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 34 лет и была похоронена в местности тюкесбури эбби, тюкесбури, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Elizabeth Montacute nació en 1325, en Donyatt, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, William Montagu, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Catherine Grandison, tenía 9 años. Se casó con Sir Guy Brienne antes de 10 de julio de 1350. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 31 de mayo de 1359, en Ashley, Hampshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 34 años, y fue sepultada en Tewkesbury Abbey, Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
